title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Haier India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Haier India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Haier India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Haier India Holdings Services:
Haier India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India Holdings Services!
